context: DDx of total fatty replacement of pancreas: pancreatic agenesis → absence of ductal system Uneven Pancreatic Lipomatosis √  commonly focal sparing of peribiliary region 1  sparing of uncinate process + peribiliary region 1a  replacement of head  35% 1b  replacement of head, neck, body  36% 2  sparing of peribiliary region only 2a  replacement of head + uncinate process  12% 2b  total replacement of pancreas  18%
